channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zim’s poultry output gross value surges past US$1,2bn
item.description: Edgar Vhera THE gross value of Zimbabwe’s poultry products has surpassed the US$1,2 billion mark with significant downstream and upstream income and employment impacts across the economy, the Zimbabwe Poultry... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Minute Maid to Launch Affordable 1-Litre Pack in Zimbabwe as Schweppes Expands Juice Brand
item.description: Schweppes Holdings Africa says it is expanding its Minute Maid product range in Zimbabwe with the introduction of a new one-litre pack aimed at consumers looking for a more family-oriented take-home option. The announcement was made by Schweppes Holdings Africa Managing Director via Zimbuzz #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Crocodile attacks increase as water levels rise:The danger beneath calm waters
item.description: Bruce Ndlovu Sunday Life Reporter WHEN a crocodile crawled onto Victoria Falls’ A’Zambezi River Lodge last month, it instantly became a worldwide phenomenon. The sight of the 13-foot-long reptile casually strolling towards the buffet counter at the lodge quickly went viral on soc via The Sunday News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Sunday News

item.title: Boxer Ndodana Ncube dies @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwean boxer Ndodana Ncube has died at the age of 29 following complications arising from injuries sustained during a boxing match in South Africa earlier this year.The Zimbabwe National Boxing an... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe indigenous churches back CAB3 Constitutional changes @bulawayo24
item.description: The Zimbabwe Indigenous Interdenominational Council of Churches (ZIICC), which says it represents more than 8.7 million members across Zimbabwe, has formally submitted its support for the Constitution... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Varakashi4ED Dismisses Chinhoyi Billboard Burning as “Manufactured Lie”
item.description: By A Correspondent – A group aligned to the ruling party has rejected media reports of a protest in Chinhoyi... Continue reading "Varakashi4ED Dismisses Chinhoyi Billboard Burning as “Manufactured Lie”" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe records Africa’s sharpest fuel price hikes @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe imposed the steepest fuel price increases in Africa during the latest Middle East oil shock, according to a joint report by four major international institutions examining the economic fallou... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe among Africa’s most debt-distressed economies @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe has fallen deeper into Africa’s most dangerous debt category after being listed among the continent’s worst debt-distressed economies in a joint report prepared by the United Nations Developm... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chinese fortune seekers invade Zimbabwe’s Wedza @bulawayo24
item.description: Residents in Zimbabwe’s Wedza district have expressed growing concern after reports emerged that three Chinese mining companies were allocated land for mineral exploration in Ward 6 of Ndoro Village n... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe State Diamond Miner Targets Increase in Output for 2026
item.description: via Bloomberg.com #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg.com

item.title: DZL hails sustained economic resilience as volumes growth surge to 26%
item.description: LISTED milk processor, Dairibord Zimbabwe Limited (DZL) has commended the obtaining sustained economic resilience for contributing immensely towards sales volumes growth which surged to 26% in the reporting period. Presenting a Trading Update for the period ended March 31, 2026, via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chinhoyi University of Technology Vice Chancellor Simbi retires
item.description: CHINHOYI University of Technology (CUT) Vice Chancellor, Professor David Jambgwa Simbi has retired, capping an illustrious career in academia spanning over two decades. Friday May 15, 2026, marked Simbi’s retirement, and a planned special farewell ceremony was scheduled but had t via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: SA Home Affairs launches ZEP audit as numbers decline @thezimbabwean
item.description: South Africa’s Department of Home Affairs says the number of Zimbabwe Exemption Permit (ZEP) holders currently in the country is likely significantly lower than the officially recorded 178 000, with authorities now conducting an audit to determine how many permit holders remain a via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: 118 Zimbabwe MPs Fail to Account for Constituency Development Funds @thezimbabwean
item.description: Only 52 out of the 170 constituencies that accessed Constituency Development Fund (CDF) allocations in 2025 have submitted acquittals accounting for how the money was used, casting light on accountability, transparency and the future disbursement of the funds. via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: Govt launches livelihoods survey as hunger threatens @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Govt launches livelihoods survey as hunger threatens -Newsday Zimbabwe THE Zimbabwe Livelihoods Assessment Committee (ZimLAC) has begun the 2026 Rural Livelihoods Assessment as the country grapples with the effects of erratic rainfall, economic strain and below-average ha via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zim launches regional first migration strategy
item.description: Shamaine Chirimujiri ZIMBABWE has launched the National Migration Data Strategy (NMDS) 2025–2030, a comprehensive framework designed to strengthen the collection and management... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a pac via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Locally-assembled laptop hits market
item.description: Ivan Zhakata-Herald Correspondent ZIMBABWE has recorded a major milestone in its technological advancement following the launch of the country’s first locally-manufactured laptop, the Avantis Parote 1030i, by indigenous firm Avantis... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Editorial Comment: CJ Gwaunza breaks glass ceiling to claim top post
item.description: THE appointment of the new Chief Justice of Zimbabwe, Elizabeth Gwaunza, marks another milestone in bringing women into the top national posts. Chief Justice Gwaunza now heads the judiciary and... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Charamba injured @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s medal hopeful in the 200m and key member of the national 4x100m relay team, Makanakaishe Charamba, has withdrawn from the African Senior Championships due to injury.National athletics coach... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe to resume London flights by June @bulawayo24
item.description: Air Zimbabwe is expected to resume flights to London by June 2026, ending a 14-year absence from the route, according to Mutapa Investment Fund chief executive John Mangudya.Mangudya said the national... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Bokola Film Festival Returns to Harare With Stories of Survival and Change @263Chat
item.description: Harare’s independent film scene will take centre stage on 30 May as the Bokola Film Festival returns to Studio Moto in Belgravia for a day-long celebration of cinema, music and youth culture. Running under the theme Hold The Line: Between Collapse and Becoming, this year’s [...] via 263chat #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat
